title: SGBD (Oracle) Data synchronization with Monday (bidirectional)

posts.author: jbraun (Julien Braun )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I will soon be faced with a major need to synchronise data from a local database (preferably Oracle but SQL Server possible).
I know that it’s possible to carry out this kind of operation via an API, but as I’m new to this kind of interface, I’m wondering if there’s another solution? Are there any pre-established connectors or apps along these lines, or do I have to set up an EDI with the Monday API? At the moment, I only need to upload data from our database to Monday, but it’s highly likely that I’ll soon have to set it up in the other direction too.
What’s more, the data to be uploaded is likely to change over time.
Thank you in advance for your advice.
Julien
